meta.source: Goetzmann & Huang, Momentum in Imperial Russia (JFE 2018); indexes for momentum paper plus figures wng.xlsx + St_Petersburg_Industry_Returns.xlsx
meta.market_weighting: equal-weighted monthly returns of all listed common shares
meta.market_sample: 1865-02 to 1914-07 (closes at WWI); industries extend to 1917-02
meta.note: Return indexes rebased to 1.0 at first observation; monthly.
